packages.name: repo-harness
packages.summary: Root router Skill; canonical entrypoint synced unconditionally to both hosts regardless of install profile.

packages.name: repo-harness-plan
packages.summary: Interactive planning entrypoint for repo-local agentic development work.

packages.name: repo-harness-check
packages.summary: Runs the repo-local harness verification gate and reports pre-merge or release readiness.

packages.name: repo-harness-handoff
packages.summary: Prepares or resumes Codex handoff packets for long-task rollover.

retirementCandidate.note: Folds into the root router's own reference surface rather than surviving as an independently grouped facade.

packages.name: repo-harness-gptpro
packages.summary: Consults or continues GPT Pro through the local ChatGPT Web browser/session provider while mapping user-facing gptpro language to browser engine commands.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-chatgpt (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-review
packages.summary: Reviews an existing plan across product, engineering, design, and DevEx dimensions.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidates into repo-harness-plan; plan and review share the same non-mutating planning surface.

packages.name: repo-harness-autoplan
packages.summary: Runs the full repo-harness workflow automatically and delegates final PR closeout to repo-harness-ship.

retirementCandidate.note: Retired; no successor facade in the target canonical set.

packages.name: repo-harness-ship
packages.summary: Validates finished worktrees, commits through finish --no-merge, pushes branches, and creates GitHub PRs by default.

packages.name: repo-harness-init
packages.summary: Installs or refreshes the agentic workflow in an existing repository without creating an app stack.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-setup (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-scaffold
packages.summary: Branch command that creates a new project or module scaffold from plan catalog A-K and attaches the harness.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-setup (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-migrate
packages.summary: Migrates legacy Claude/Codex workflow surfaces while preserving or archiving user-authored content.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-setup (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-upgrade
packages.summary: Refreshes an already-installed harness using manifest-owned upgrade actions.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-setup (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-capability
packages.summary: Adds selected capability boundaries without running full init, migrate, or upgrade.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-setup (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-architecture
packages.summary: Resolves architecture drift requests and updates architecture docs or diagrams without refreshing the harness.

packages.name: repo-harness-deploy
packages.summary: Checks deploy and private operations configuration without publishing or deploying.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidates into repo-harness-check; deploy-ops readiness folds into the verification-gate surface.

packages.name: repo-harness-repair
packages.summary: Repairs broken task sync, hook routing, handoff, context-map, policy, or helper drift.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-setup (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-prd
packages.summary: Generates an AI-implementation-friendly PRD from a product idea into plans/prds/ after a geju framing pass, using Claude first and Codex only as fallback; the geju thesis and falsifier are pre-contract exploration and must be frozen into a delegated contract's ## Why / ## Falsifier.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-product (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-sprint
packages.summary: Plans a long-task sprint backlog from an upper-layer PRD and expands each row with $think before the task-contract flow.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-product (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-goal
packages.summary: Prepares a bounded host-native /goal prompt from detailed PRD or Sprint artifacts and requires those documents before continuation.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-product (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-gptpro-setup
packages.summary: Guides gptpro_browser and gptpro_mcp setup so local repo-harness can use ChatGPT Web sessions and ChatGPT can connect back through MCP.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-chatgpt (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: think
packages.summary: Waza planning skill: turns rough ideas into approved, decision-complete plans. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: hunt
packages.summary: Waza root-cause debugging skill. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: check
packages.summary: Waza review/audit skill for diffs, PRs, and release readiness. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: health
packages.summary: Waza project-audit skill. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: mermaid
packages.summary: Diagram-design skill. Fetched from BfdCampos/dotfiles via bunx skills add.

packages.name: codex-review
packages.summary: Cross-model review skill: OpenAI Codex reviews the current Claude-authored diff. Installed on the Claude host.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-cross-review (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: claude-review
packages.summary: Cross-model review skill: Claude reviews the current Codex-authored diff. Installed on the Codex host.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-cross-review (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: claude-plan
packages.summary: External-brain plan consult skill: headless Claude plan mode reviews a Codex plan/decision brief. Installed on the Codex host.

packages.name: repo-harness-chatgpt-bridge
packages.summary: ChatGPT MCP connector bridge package; additive only after an explicit ChatGPT setup action, never implied by any install profile.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-chatgpt (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).

packages.name: repo-harness-chatgpt-browser
packages.summary: ChatGPT Web browser/session engine package; additive only after an explicit ChatGPT setup action, never implied by any install profile.

retirementCandidate.note: Consolidation target: repo-harness-chatgpt (planned facade, not yet created in this slice).
